prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 24312→24195→22574→20211→46928，2021–2024 年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），2025 年因新高考专业组拆分，英语（克拉玛依）等不限选科专业组出现异常低位 46928，但主流物化专业组（303）位次约 21967，与 2024 年基本持平；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 27 人、2022 年 34 人、2023 年 37 人、2024 年 46 人、2025 年 56 人，持续扩招；2026 年计划 54 人，较 2025 年小幅缩减 2 人，缩招约 3.6%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校，隶属中国石油大学（北京）体系；软科主榜校本部排名约第 62 名（2026 年），近年排名在 48–62 名之间波动，整体处于全国中上水平；该校在声誉舆情文件中无显著负面或正面事件记录，抖音热度未进入前 100 名，整体关注度一般，报考心理平稳；校本部石油与天然气工程为 A+ 学科（第四轮），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等为 B+ 及以上；克拉玛依校区共享校本部学科资源，石油工程、油气储运工程等专业为传统优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；石油工程、化学工程与工艺等传统工科热度平稳；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年（173347 人）减少约 3.4%，竞争压力略有缓解；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，地理位置偏远，对中东部考生吸引力有限，但 211 层次和石油行业就业优势对部分考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年物理类异常低位 46928 主要由不限选科专业组（英语）造成，2026 年该专业组计划缩减，主流物化专业组位次预计回归 2021–2024 年区间；2026 年计划小幅缩招 2 人、本省物理类考生减少约 3.4%，供需双向收缩；预测最低位次约 46200 名，区间 45700–46700 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics categories were approximately 24312 → 24195 → 22574 → 20211 → 46928. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In 2025, due to the new Gaokao subject group split, the English (Karamay) group with no subject restrictions showed an abnormally low ranking of 46928, but the mainstream physics-chemistry subject group (303) had a ranking of about 21967, roughly the same as 2024. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 27 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 56 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 54, a slight reduction of 2 from 2025, a decrease of about 3.6%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, affiliated with the China University of Petroleum (Beijing) system. On the Soft Science main ranking, the main campus ranks about 62nd (2026), with fluctuations between 48th and 62nd in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation and public opinion files; Douyin popularity is not in the top 100, overall attention is moderate, and application psychology is stable. The main campus's petroleum and natural gas engineering is an A+ discipline (fourth round), with chemical engineering and technology, geological resources and geological engineering at B+ or above. The Karamay campus shares the main campus's disciplinary resources, with petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering as traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity. Traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering and chemical engineering and technology have stable popularity. In 2026, the province has about 167,419 physics category examinees, a decrease of about 3.4% from 2025 (173,347), slightly easing competitive pressure. The school is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, a remote area with limited appeal to central and eastern examinees, but the 211 level and employment advantages in the petroleum industry still strongly attract some examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the abnormally low ranking of 46928 in 2025 for the physics category was mainly caused by the subject-unrestricted group (English), and the 2026 plan for that group is reduced, the mainstream physics-chemistry group ranking is expected to return to the 2021–2024 range. In 2026, the plan slightly reduces by 2, and provincial physics examinees decrease by about 3.4%, with both supply and demand contracting. The predicted minimum ranking is about 46,200, with a range of 45,700–46,700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Automation (Karamay)
- Computer Class (Karamay) (Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Petroleum Engineering (Karamay)
- New Energy Science and Engineering (Karamay).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Karamay)
- Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering (Karamay)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Karamay)
- Artificial Intelligence (Karamay)
- Safety Engineering (Karamay).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Karamay)
- Environmental Engineering (Karamay)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Karamay)
- Russian (Karamay) (Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering)
- Accounting (Karamay).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 45,700–46,700, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 45,000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Automation and Computer Class. If your ranking is near the upper limit (outside 46,700), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 majors as a safe choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 5169→4833→4319→3498→3990, showing a continuous upward trend from 2021 to 2024 (decreasing ranking numbers), with a slight decline to 3990 in 2025, fluctuating by about 500 places in the past two years; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 4 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is only 2, a significant reduction of 50% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with the main campus ranked approximately 62nd in the Soft Science rankings (2026), stable in the 48–62 range in recent years; the school has no significant records in reputation and public opinion files, with Douyin popularity not in the top 100, overall attention is moderate, and application psychology is stable; the main campus's petroleum and natural gas engineering is an A+ discipline, but liberal arts majors (Ideological and Political Education, Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature) have low correlation with the main campus's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Ideological and Political Education major is stable, while the Accounting major is recommended but with significant divergence; the number of history category examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% compared to 2025 (84,879), greatly alleviating competition pressure; the school is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, a remote area with limited appeal to liberal arts examinees, but the 211 level still attracts some students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 history category enrollment plan sharply dropping from 4 to 2 (a 50% reduction), while the number of history category examinees in the province decreases by about 25.6%, both supply and demand contract but the plan reduction is larger, expected to intensify competition and move rankings forward (decreasing numbers); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2820, with a range of 2770–2870.

- Ideological and Political Education (Karamay).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 2770–2870 can actively apply; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit can confidently apply.
